resources.string: Main system prompt defining LineCode\'s identity, workflow, tool loop, response conventions, and composing other context templates.
Injects current workspace, app private directory, Skills directory, and SSH Skills directory, constraining default file operation paths.
Tone and output style constraints appended when AI behavior is set to \"Coding mode\".
Tone and output style constraints appended when AI behavior is set to \"Chat mode\".
Injected when the top session mode is set to Chat; read-only conversation, explanation and search, no file modification or Shell execution.
Injected when the top session mode is set to Plan; read-only planning, context gathering allowed but plan execution forbidden.
Injected when the top session mode is set to Agent; allows reading, modifying, executing and verifying tasks per permissions.
Injected when the top session mode is set to Control; only phone control tools allowed, file operations, Shell and Agent forbidden.
When learning mode is on, renders short-term memory, long-term memory, chat retrieval and Skills retrieval results into the system prompt.
Used when learning mode saves memories; instructs the model to extract user/project/environment memories from the current conversation.
Used when learning mode decides whether to generate a reusable Skill; constrains JSON output and Skill content format.
Used to summarize old conversation when context gets too long; requires the model to output a compaction summary that can recover task state.
Injects the current model\'s modelId, name, provider and protocol into the system prompt so the model answers capability questions based on the model identifier.
Injects the current TODO list into the system prompt, guiding the model to advance in order and update state in time.
Injected into the system prompt when the current TODO list is empty; recommends Plan/Agent mode to use todo_update to break down tasks and explains cross-turn maintenance semantics.
Role definition and rule constraints for explore-type Agents in SSH remote or terminal provider mode.
Role definition and rule constraints for coding-type Agents in SSH remote or terminal provider mode.
Role definition and rule constraints for explore-type Agents in local mode.
Role definition and rule constraints for coding-type Agents in local mode.
Composition template for Agent system prompt; concatenates role, task, workspace, scope, extension and tool context into a full system prompt.
System prompt sent by the image understanding tool to the vision model; constrains the model to return only analysis relevant to the image and prompt.
Summary prefix injected after context compaction; contains the formatted summary content and instructs the model to continue from the previous conversation.
Fallback prefix injected after compaction via the OpenAI Responses compact API; instructs the model to continue from the previous conversation.
